text:
<https://pastebin.com/Wf9sbbxc> lines 11–14: 

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        phoronix-test-suite-php73: 10.4.0 [FreeBSD]
        phoronix-test-suite-php74: 10.4.0 [FreeBSD]
        phoronix-test-suite-php80: 10.4.0 [FreeBSD]

Please, is that an intended result? 

pkg install benchmarks/phoronix-test-suite

– is the primary method at (for example) 
  <https://www.freshports.org/benchmarks/phoronix-test-suite#add>
